title: Zcash Foundation releases first stable, audited version of Zebra
contentSnippet: Zebra is an alternative Zcash node implementation that has been written in entirely in RUST. It can be used to join the Zcash peer-to-peer network, validate and broadcast transactions, and maintain the Zcash blockchain state in a distributed manner.
